song.title: My Hope Is Built On Nothing Less
song.author: Edward Mote, William Bradbury
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .C Am F My hope is built on nothing less, . G C Than Jesus Christ, my righteousness; . Am F I dare not trust the sweetest frame, . G C But wholly lean on Jesus name.
[C] . F G Am C On Christ, the solid rock I stand; . F G C All other ground is just sinking sand!
[V2] When darkness veils His lovely face, I rest on His unchanging grace; In every high and stormy gale, My anchor holds within the veil.
[V3] His oath, His covenant, His blood, Support me in the whelming flood; When all around my soul gives way, He then is all my hope and stay.
[V4] When He shall come with trumpet sound, Oh, may I then in Him be found; In Him, my righteousness, alone, Faultless to stand before the throne.
